# Let's load the text_to_analyse.txt to see its content
with open('/mnt/data/file-TvqkrWVNUKR5VKQQ86kW5H-text_to_analyse.txt', 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    text = f.read()
print(text[:500])
print("... total length:", len(text))

import re

# search for any Arabic letters
arabic_spans = re.findall(r'[\u0600-\u06FF]+', text)
arabic_spans[:20], len(arabic_spans)

# find block quotes in English indicated by "..."
import re
quotes = re.findall(r'"([^"]+)"', text)
quotes[:10], len(quotes)

# Let's locate these quotes occurrences with context
for m in re.finditer(r'"([^"]+)"', text):
    phrase = m.group(1)
    start = m.start(1)
    end = m.end(1)
    context = text[max(0,start-50):min(len(text),end+50)]
    print("Context...", context)
    print("Span:", phrase)
    print("Indices:", start, end)
    print("---")

# check edges of first instance
start, end = 384, 758
snippet = text[start:end]
print(repr(snippet[:10]), repr(snippet[-10:]))

import re
text = text  # loaded earlier
# punctuation and whitespace to trim
trim_chars = set(list(" \t\n\r\u060C\u061B\u061F.,!?:;…\u0640"))  # includes Arabic comma, semicolon, question, tatweel
# function to trim
def trim_indices(s, start, end):
    # s is full text, want to trim from start to end
    while start < end and s[start] in trim_chars:
        start += 1
    while end > start and s[end-1] in trim_chars:
        end -= 1
    return start, end

citations = []
for m in re.finditer(r'"([^"]+)"', text):
    raw_start = m.start(1)
    raw_end = m.end(1)
    # trim
    ts, te = trim_indices(text, raw_start, raw_end)
    span_text = text[ts:te]
    # classification
    ctx = text[max(0,ts-64):ts] + text[te:min(len(text), te+64)]
    if re.search(r'\b(Surah|verse)\b', ctx, re.IGNORECASE):
        ctype = "Aya"
    elif re.search(r'\b(Hadith|hadith|Sahih|Muslim|Bukhari)\b', ctx):
        ctype = "Hadeeth"
    else:
        continue
    citations.append({"span_start": ts, "span_end": te, "span_text": span_text, "citation_type": ctype})

# Print results
for c in citations:
    print(c)

# find match around 3361 again
i = 0
for m in re.finditer(r'"([^"]+)"', text):
    raw_start = m.start(1)
    if raw_start == 3361:
        ts, te = trim_indices(text, raw_start, m.end(1))
        ctx = text[max(0,ts-64):ts] + text[te:min(len(text), te+64)]
        print("Context:\n", ctx)
        # check both conditions
        print("ayah cue:", bool(re.search(r'\b(Surah|verse)\b', ctx, re.IGNORECASE)))
        print("hadith cue:", bool(re.search(r'\b(Hadith|hadith|Sahih|Muslim|Bukhari)\b', ctx)))
        break
